cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question and the passage. The task is to find which statement is true based on the passage. First, I'll go through each option one by one. Option (A): "Last fall, there was the second lowest number of grown salmon returning on record." The passage mentions that "only about 90,000 adult salmon returned to the Central Valley last fall--the second lowest number on record..." So this seems correct. The number 90,000 is stated as the second lowest. So (A) could be the right answer. Option (B): "The salmon migrates to the ocean when they grow up." The passage says, "wild salmon are born in streams and rivers, migrate to the ocean when they're juveniles..." So it's when they're juveniles, not when they grow up. So (B) is incorrect. Option (C): "The farm-raised salmon is not as delicious and nutrients as the wild salmon." The passage mentions that there will be abundant farm-raised salmon, but it doesn't compare their taste or nutrition to wild salmon. So (C) is not stated in the passage, so it's not correct.
